title: Better Brightness Slider
description: Drag the brightness-/gamma-slider to higher and lower values than default
body:
Better Brightness Slider expands the default brightness slider, making it range from -100% to 1200% (fullbright) instead of 0% to 100%. It's a clientside mod, so it isn't required on servers. The feature is ported from Boosted Brightness, if you want a fabric version, download it there.

The mod should be compatible with Optifine and Rubidium (Forge Sodium).

 

If you want your own Minecraft server to play with friends, check out Kinetic Hosting. They provide powerful servers for a fair price while being easy to use, and they have a nice support. Click on the image below for more information, and if you are interested, use code **LAIDBACKSLOTH** at checkout for a 15% discount.
